kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: TC-E2E-01 Create Account and Verify via API

kw.name: Open Application
Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: Base URL must not be empty. Please set it in config/env.yaml
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Opens the application

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Create Checking Account
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Get List Items
kw.doc: Returns all labels or values of selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=type' by label CHECKING.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=fromAccountId' by index 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Create a checking account with the provided details

kw.name: Verify Account Creation Success Message
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: Congratulations, your account is now open.
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Verify that the account creation success message is displayed

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/accounts/22446 path_url=/parabank/services/bank/accounts/22446 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

C:\Users\mridu\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'parabank.parasoft.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Close Application
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closing the application

test.doc: Verify that account created via UI is successfully available in the API response.
